title: Namera overnight phase 3 push
goal: Advance Namera with honest phase 3 transfer semantics where feasible, otherwise highest-value user-facing backlog slices, with tests/docs/commits per green slice.
done_criteria: A meaningful implementation slice lands with passing relevant tests
Docs reflect the new honest project state
Durable task snapshot records the last verified step and next step
constraints: Stay truthful about phase 3 transfer capabilities
Prefer safe user-facing value when real transfer execution is not yet supportable
Keep changes non-destructive and covered by relevant tests
last_verified_step: Added WebDAV transfer readiness summaries with blocked-reason rollups across the review set, and verified with vitest.
next_step: Pursue deeper truthful phase 3 semantics, likely persisted transfer intent/state or native WebDAV prerequisite scaffolding.

milestones.title: Run relevant tests and document results
